title: RegistrySignature
description: Canonical cryptographic signature object used across the Universal Registry Fabric (URF-S).

signature_id.description: Unique identifier for this signature object.

algorithm.description: Cryptographic algorithm used to generate the signature (e.g., SHA-256, SHA-3, Ed25519).

public_key.description: Public key associated with the signature, if applicable.

signed_at.description: Timestamp when the signature was generated.

signer.description: Information about the entity that generated the signature.
